Angels & Demons (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $133,375,846Details
International Box Office $357,500,000
Worldwide Box Office $490,875,846
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $36,768,508
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,540,457
Total $50,308,965
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$46,204,168 (34.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.89 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:27.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,527 opening theaters/3,527 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $212,690,014

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 15th, 2009 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: June 27th, 2025 (Limited), released as Melekler ve Şeytanlar (Turkey)
Video Release: November 24th, 2009 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of violence, disturbing images and thematic material
Running Time: 138 minutes
Franchise: Da Vinci Code
Plot point: Catholic, Kidnap, Revenge, Shadowy Organization, Terrorism
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Imagine Entertainment, Brian Grazer Productions, John Calley
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
